title: Telemedicine | Piel en Armonia
description: Remote dermatology integrated into the same clinical system in Quito.

hero.title: Remote guidance with medical criteria and a clear escalation path.
hero.deck: This page explains when to start remotely, what to share, and when to move to in-person care.

mediaMeta.alt: Remote dermatology care with clinical triage

points: Choose video, phone, or WhatsApp according to your context.
Share concern, evolution, and useful images before consultation.
We escalate to clinic when physical examination or procedure is required.
Follow-up control for acne, rosacea, and other inflammatory conditions.
Review of response to ongoing treatment.
Early guidance for spots, texture changes, or a recent lesion.
Escalate to comprehensive diagnosis when the case is broad or uncertain.
Escalate to a procedural route when indication is already defined.
Keep the same booking and human support throughout the process.

booking.title: Remote booking keeps the same operational security as the main flow.
booking.deck: You can start with online mode preselected and clinical context already structured.
